title: coleus scutellarioides var. ingratus
intro: Coleus scutellarioides var. ingratus, also known as Coleus ingratus, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Coleus ingratus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In traditional herbal medicine, Coleus ingratus is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various ailments.
